inline_comments.message:
With this command files are tarred with "application/" path prepended so they'll get extracted to wrong dir on dest.


TASK [application : Archive helm charts] *********************************************************************************************************************************************
 [WARNING]: Consider using the unarchive module rather than running 'tar'.  If you need to use command because unarchive is insufficient you can add 'warn: false' to this command
task or set 'command_warnings=False' in ansible.cfg to get rid of this message.


Add "warn: false" to "command" args to suppress that warning.

Also add linter exception for this task to suppress this:

--> Executing Ansible Lint on /w/workspace/offline-installer-master-review/ansible/roles/application/molecule/default/playbook.yml...
    [303] tar used in place of unarchive module
    tasks/transfer-helm-charts.yml:5
    Task/Handler: Archive helm charts
does this pass idempotency test of molecule?
